Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Ability
    Base contract for a single ability within a skill.
    AbilitySelectionHolder
    Holder for the active-ability selection inventory.
    AbstractSidebarContributor
    Convenience base class for SidebarContributor implementations.
    AbstractSkill
    Base implementation of Skill providing id, display name, ability registration, and default listener registration.
    AcceptSubCommand
    /clan accept <clan> — accepts a pending invite and joins the clan.
    ActiveAbility
    Extension of Ability for abilities that are manually triggered by the player.
    ActiveAbilityCoordinator
    Generic coordinator for active-ability selection and activation.
    ActiveBuffTracker
    Tracks which timed buff abilities are currently active per player.
    ApiEnvelope<T>
    Represents a standard API response envelope from the XenForo/Sylphian API.
    ApiEnvelope<T>
    Standard API response envelope used across the Sylphian network.
    BaitConfig
    Immutable configuration for a single bait type.
    BaitConfigLoader
    Loads bait definitions from baits.yml.
    BaitItem
    Utility class for creating bait items and identifying bait projectiles.
    BaitListener
    Handles bait item throwing and zone creation on water landing.
    BaitZone
    Represents an active bait zone in the world.
    BaitZoneService
    Manages bait configurations and active bait zones.
    BalanceChangePublisher
    Announces balance changes.
    BalanceCommand
    /balance [player] - shows your own balance or another online player's.
    BalanceModel
    Database model representing a record in the mc_economy_balances table.
    BiteTimerConfig
    Immutable configuration for the custom fishing timer system.
    BiteTimerService
    Service responsible for overriding the vanilla fishing timers.
    CatchEffectService
    Applies visual and audio catch effects to the player based on the rarity of the fish they caught.
    CatchMomentum
    Immutable snapshot of a player's Steady Current momentum at a given location.
    CatchResult
    Represents the result of a fishing catch attempt.
    ChatListener
    Listener for player chat events.
    ClaimDao
    JDBI DAO for the clan_claims table.
    ClaimDao.ClaimInsert
    A single row for batch insertion, with values already in DB-native types (clanId as a string, claimedAt as an epoch second).
    ClaimDao.ClaimRow
    Raw row from the clan_claims table.
    ClaimModel
    Raw database row from the clan_claims table.
    ClaimRepository
    JDBI-backed implementation of IClaimRepository.
    ClaimSubCommand
    /clan claim [radius] — claims the current chunk, optionally a square out to a radius (0-5).
    Clan
    An immutable snapshot of a clan and its membership at a point in time.
    ClanAdminCommand
    Builds and registers the operator-only /sylphian-clans CommandAPI command tree.
    ClanAdminContext
    Services and helpers passed to every /sylphian-clans admin subcommand.
    ClanAPI
    The public, cross-plugin contract for Sylphian-Clans, obtained via ClanProvider.
    ClanCache
    In-memory cache of clan snapshots, keyed on player UUID.
    ClanClaimEvent
    Fired when a clan claims a chunk.
    ClanClaimEvent.Post
    Notification fired on the main thread after the claim is persisted.
    ClanClaimEvent.Pre
    Cancellable signal fired on the main thread before the claim is written.
    ClanCommand
    Builds and registers the root /clan CommandAPI command tree from its subcommand branches.
    ClanCommandContext
    Shared services and helpers passed to every /clan subcommand.
    ClanCreateEvent
    Fired when a clan is created.
    ClanCreateEvent.Post
    Notification fired on the main thread after the clan is persisted.
    ClanCreateEvent.Pre
    Cancellable signal fired on the main thread before the clan is written.
    ClanDao
    JDBI DAO for the clans, clan_members, and clan_member_permissions tables.
    ClanDao.ClanRow
    Raw row from the clans table.
    ClanDao.MemberRow
    Raw row from the clan_members table.
    ClanDao.PermissionRow
    A member UUID paired with one of their permission names (null if they have none).
    ClanDisbandEvent
    Fired when a clan is disbanded.
    ClanDisbandEvent.Post
    Notification fired on the main thread after the clan is removed.
    ClanDisbandEvent.Pre
    Cancellable signal fired on the main thread before the clan is removed.
    ClanInviteService
    Manages pending clan invites in memory.
    ClanInviteService.PendingInvite
    A single pending clan invite.
    ClanLeadershipTransferEvent
    Fired on the main thread after clan leadership passes from one member to another.
    ClanListener
    Listens for player lifecycle events to keep ClanCache populated, seeding on join and evicting on quit so the cache stays bounded by online players.
    ClanMember
    An immutable snapshot of a single member within a clan.
    ClanMemberJoinEvent
    Fired when a player joins a clan.
    ClanMemberJoinEvent.Post
    Notification fired on the main thread after the member is persisted.
    ClanMemberJoinEvent.Pre
    Cancellable signal fired on the main thread before the member is written.
    ClanMemberLeaveEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a player leaves or is kicked from a clan.
    ClanMemberLeaveEvent.Cause
    Why a member was removed.
    ClanMemberModel
    Raw database row from the clan_members table.
    ClanModel
    Raw database row from the clans table.
    ClanMotdChangeEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a clan's message of the day is set or cleared.
    ClanPermission
    A capability that can be granted to or revoked from an individual clan member.
    ClanPermissionChangeEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a clan member is granted or revoked a permission.
    ClanPermissionChangeEvent.Action
    Whether the permission was added or removed.
    ClanPermissionHolder
    Inventory holder identifying an open clan permission GUI.
    ClanPermissionListener
    Routes clicks within the clan permission GUI and prevents item movement.
    ClanPermissionMenu
    Chest GUI for viewing and editing a single clan member's permissions.
    ClanPlaceholderExpansion
    Exposes clan data as PlaceholderAPI placeholders.
    ClanProvider
    Static access point to the clan API.
    ClanRepository
    JDBI-backed implementation of IClanRepository.
    ClanRole
    The role held by a member within a clan.
    ClansConfig
    Immutable snapshot of reloadable settings from config.yml.
    ClanService
    Business logic implementation of ClanAPI.
    ClanTeleportWarmupManager
    Manages pending clan teleport warmups (used by warps).
    ClanTerritoryEnterEvent
    Fired on the main thread when a player walks into a chunk owned by a clan, having just been in wilderness or another clan's territory.
    ClanTerritoryExitEvent
    Fired on the main thread when a player leaves a chunk owned by a clan, stepping into wilderness or another clan's territory.
    ClanUnclaimEvent
    Fired when a clan unclaims a chunk.
    ClanUnclaimEvent.Post
    Notification fired on the main thread after the claim is removed.
    ClanUnclaimEvent.Pre
    Cancellable signal fired on the main thread before the claim is removed.
    ClanWarpAccessHolder
    Inventory holder for the per-warp access editor GUI.
    ClanWarpAccessMenu
    Per-warp access editor: toggle a warp between public and restricted, and grant or revoke individual members' access.
    ClanWarpCreateEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a clan creates a new warp.
    ClanWarpDao
    JDBI DAO for the clan_warps and clan_warp_access tables.
    ClanWarpDao.WarpRow
    Raw row from the clan_warps table.
    ClanWarpDeleteEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a clan warp is removed.
    ClanWarpHolder
    Inventory holder for the clan warp list GUI.
    ClanWarpListener
    Routes clicks for the warp list GUI and the per-warp access editor, and blocks item movement.
    ClanWarpMenu
    Chest GUI listing a clan's warps.
    ClanWarpModel
    Represents a single named clan warp.
    ClanWarpRepository
    JDBI-backed implementation of IClanWarpRepository.
    ClanWarpService
    Business logic for clan warps and their per-warp access.
    ColorfulGUI
    Colorful glass-pane picker opening style.
    ColorfulGUIHolder
    Inventory holder for the colorful pane-picker opening style.
    ConfigLoader
    Loads and manages plugin configuration.
    CookingItemProvider
    Exposes the output items of all cooking recipes to Sylphian-Items ItemRegistry.
    CookingRecipe
    Represents a single cooking recipe.
    CookingStationGui
    Builds and updates the custom cooking station inventory GUI.
    CookingStationHolder
    Marks a custom inventory as belonging to a cooking station at a specific block location.
    CookingStationListener
    Handles all events related to cooking stations.
    CookingStationPdc
    Handles serialization and deserialization of CookingStationState to and from the PersistentDataContainer of a block entity (furnace or campfire).
    CookingStationService
    Manages the lifecycle of all active cooking stations.
    CookingStationState
    Mutable runtime state for a single cooking station (furnace or campfire block).
    CooldownManager
    Tracks per-player, per-ability cooldowns for active skills.
    CrateConfig
    Immutable definition of a crate and its reward pool.
    CrateConfigLoader
    Loads and parses crate definitions from crates.yml.
    CrateEconomy
    Soft-dependency bridge to Sylphian-Economy.
    CrateEconomyReloadListener
    Reparses crate configs when the economy config changes, so money-reward display names regenerate with the new currency symbol.
    CrateKey
    Utility class for creating physical crate key items and reading their identity.
    CratesCommand
    Opens the crates GUI for the executing player.
    CrateService
    Service responsible for rolling and granting crate rewards.
    CratesGUI
    Builds and opens the main crates GUI for a player.
    CratesGUIHolder
    Custom InventoryHolder for the crates GUI.
    CratesItemProvider
    Exposes Sylphian-Crates items to the cross-plugin item registry.
    CratesListener
    Handles all inventory events for the crates and reward selection GUIs.
    CreateSubCommand
    /clan create <name> — founds a new clan with the sender as leader.
    DatabaseService
    Core service layer providing database access and migration management.
    DeclineSubCommand
    /clan decline <clan> — discards a pending invite.
    DisbandSubCommand
    /sylphian-clans disband <clan_name> — force-disbands a clan, bypassing permission checks.
    DisbandSubCommand
    /clan disband — leader-only; permanently deletes the clan.
    DoubleHaul
    Active ability unlocked at level 15.
    EconomyAdminCommand
    /economy <give|take|set> <player> <amount> - administrative balance management.
    EconomyAPI
    The public, cross-plugin contract for the Sylphian economy, obtained via EconomyProvider.
    EconomyConfigReloadEvent
    Fired on the main thread after the economy config is reloaded.
    EconomyDao
    JDBI DAO for the mc_economy_balances table.
    EconomyListener
    Ensures every joining player has an economy account row.
    EconomyPlaceholderExpansion
    Exposes economy data as PlaceholderAPI placeholders.
    EconomyProvider
    Static access point to the economy API.
    EconomyRepository
    Repository implementation for economy balances using JDBI.
    EconomyService
    Business-logic implementation of EconomyAPI.
    EncyclopaediaCommand
    Command to open the fish encyclopaedia GUI for a player.
    EncyclopaediaHolder
    Inventory holder for the fish encyclopaedia GUI.
    EncyclopaediaListener
    Listener for inventory events within the fish encyclopaedia GUI.
    EncyclopaediaMenu
    Manages the generation and display of the fish encyclopaedia GUI.
    FishCastTrigger
    Trigger token fired when a player casts their fishing rod (state FISHING).
    FishCatchTrigger
    Trigger token fired when a player catches a Sylphian fish (state CAUGHT_FISH).
    FishContext
    Contextual information for a fish catch.
    FishEncyclopaediaDao
    Data Access Object for the fish_encyclopaedia table.
    FishEncyclopaediaDao.FishEncyclopaediaRow
    Represents a raw row from the fish_encyclopaedia table.
    FishEncyclopaediaModel
    Data model representing a player's entry in the fish encyclopaedia.
    FishEncyclopaediaRepository
    Implementation of IFishEncyclopaediaRepository using JDBI.
    FishersFrenzy
    Active ability unlocked at level 25.
    FishingContributor
    Contributes fishing session information to the player sidebar.
    FishingItemProvider
    Exposes Sylphian-Fishing items to the cross-plugin item registry.
    FishingListener
    Central listener for all player fishing events.
    FishingSkill
    The Fishing skill contributed to Sylphian-Skills by Sylphian-Fishing.
    FishingSkillConfig
    Immutable snapshot of all fishing-skill configuration values.
    FishMutation
    Interface representing a mutation that can be applied to a caught fish.
    FishMutationService
    Service for managing and applying fish mutations.
    FuelConfigLoader
    Parses the fuels section of config.yml into a map of Material → burn time in ticks.
    IClaimRepository
    Async persistence contract for territory claims.
    IClanRepository
    Async persistence contract for clans, members, and member permissions.
    IClanWarpRepository
    Async persistence contract for clan warps and their per-warp access lists.
    IEconomyRepository
    Interface for economy balance persistence operations.
    IFishEncyclopaediaRepository
    Contract for fish encyclopaedia persistence operations.
    InfoSubCommand
    /clan info [clan] — shows the sender's clan, or a named clan.
    IngredientSpec
    Represents a single ingredient requirement in a CookingRecipe.
    InvitesSubCommand
    /clan invites — lists the sender's pending invites.
    InviteSubCommand
    /clan invite <player> — invites an online player to the sender's clan.
    IPlayerRepository
    Interface for player data persistence operations.
    ISessionRepository
    Interface for session data persistence operations.
    ISkillRepository
    Persistence contract for player skill data.
    ItemBuilder
    Utility class for building ItemStacks with fluent API.
    ItemProvider
    Implemented by any plugin that wants to expose custom items to other plugins.
    ItemRegistry
    Central registry for cross-plugin custom items.
    KeyConfig
    Immutable definition of a physical crate key item.
    KeyConfigLoader
    Loads and parses key definitions from keys.yml.
    KickSubCommand
    /sylphian-clans kick <player> — force-removes a player from their clan.
    KickSubCommand
    /clan kick <player> — removes a member from the sender's clan.
    LeaveSubCommand
    /clan leave — leaves the sender's clan, disbanding it if they are the sole member.
    LineMastery
    Passive perk unlocked at level 10.
    ListSubCommand
    /clan list — lists every clan with member counts.
    LootEntry
    Represents a single entry in the fishing loot table.
    LootService
    Manages the loot rolling logic for the fishing system.
    LootTableConfigLoader
    Loads and parses fish definitions from loot_table.yml.
    MapSubCommand
    /clan map — renders a 9x9 territory map around the player.
    MasterAngler
    Passive perk unlocked at level 30.
    MaterialIngredientSpec
    Matches a vanilla Minecraft item by Material type.
    MessageUtils
    Utility class for constructing user-facing Adventure Component messages.
    MessageUtils
    Utility class for building user-facing Adventure components on Velocity.
    Migration
    Interface representing a single version-controlled database schema change.
    Migration001CreateBalances
    Migration V1: creates the mc_economy_balances table.
    Migration001CreateClans
    Migration V1: creates the clans table.
    Migration001CreateFishEncyclopaedia
    Migration version 1: CreateFishEncyclopaedia.
    Migration001CreatePlayers
    Migration V1: Creates the mc_players table.
    Migration001CreatePlayerSkills
    Migration V1: Creates the player_skills table.
    Migration002CreateClanMembers
    Migration V2: creates the clan_members table.
    Migration002CreateSessions
    Migration V2: Creates the mc_sessions table.
    Migration003CreateClanMemberPermissions
    Migration V3: creates the clan_member_permissions table.
    Migration004CreateClanClaims
    Migration V4: creates the clan_claims table.
    Migration005AddClaimsFK
    Migration V5: adds an ON DELETE CASCADE foreign key from clan_claims to clans.
    Migration006CreateClanWarps
    Migration V6: replaces the legacy clan_homes table with clan_warps and clan_warp_access.
    MigrationRunner
    Handles the execution and tracking of database migrations.
    MiniMessageSanitizer
    Strips click/hover/insertion from player-supplied MiniMessage before it is stored or echoed.
    MoneyFormat
    Renders and parses currency for display and commands.
    MotdSubCommand
    /clan motd <message> or /clan motd clear — sets or clears the clan MOTD.
    MutationConfig
    Immutable configuration for a single fish mutation.
    NamespacedIngredientSpec
    Matches a custom item registered via Sylphian-Items ItemRegistry by checking the PDC key <plugin-namespace>:item_id stamped on the ItemStack.
    NametagService
    Sub-service responsible for nametag team management.
    NametagTeam
    Holds the state for a single nametag team — the prefix shown above a player's head and the set of player name entries assigned to that team.
    OpeningStyle
     
    PapiPlaceholderBridge
    Delegates to PlaceholderAPI.
    PassiveAbility
    Extension of Ability for passives that participate in the passive framework routing.
    PassiveTrigger
    Marker interface for passive ability trigger tokens.
    PatientAngler
    Active ability unlocked at level 5.
    PayCommand
    /pay <player> <amount> — transfers money to another online player.
    PermissionSubCommand
    /clan permission <player> grant|revoke <permission> and /clan permission <player> list.
    PlaceholderResolver
    Resolves a PlaceholderAPI placeholder string for a player.
    PlayerBalanceChangeEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a player's balance changes.
    PlayerDao
    JDBI DAO for the mc_players table.
    PlayerDao.PlayerRow
    Internal data transfer object for JDBI mapping.
    PlayerIdentity
    Represents a player's verified forum identity.
    PlayerIdentity
    Represents a verified player identity on the Velocity proxy.
    PlayerListener
    Listens for player connection and disconnection events on the Paper server.
    PlayerListener
    Listens for player-related events on the Velocity proxy to handle verification and data synchronization.
    PlayerModel
    Database model representing a record in the mc_players table.
    PlayerRepository
    Repository implementation for player data using JDBI.
    PlayerService
    Core service for player management logic.
    PlaytimeCommand
    Command to view a player's total cumulative playtime.
    ProfileContributor
    Contributes player profile information to the sidebar.
    ProfileListener
    Listener for player join and quit events.
    ProfileManager
    Manages the in-memory cache of online player profiles.
    ProfileProvider
    Static access point to the profile API.
    ProfileProvider.ProfileAPI
    Public interface for cross-module profile operations.
    Rarity
    Represents a catch rarity level (e.g., COMMON, RARE, LEGENDARY).
    RarityCatchEffects
    Immutable configuration for catch effects triggered when a fish of a specific rarity is caught.
    RarityCatchEffects.BroadcastConfig
    Server-wide broadcast message.
    RarityCatchEffects.ParticleConfig
    Particle effect spawned at the hook location.
    RarityCatchEffects.SoundConfig
    Sound effect played to the catching player.
    RarityCatchEffects.TitleConfig
    Title shown to the catching player.
    RecipeConfigLoader
    Parses cooking recipe definitions from recipes.yml.
    ReloadSubCommand
    /sylphian-clans reload — re-reads config.yml and applies the new settings live.
    ReloadSubCommand
    /sylphian-skills reload: re-reads config.yml and applies the new settings live.
    RewardEntry
    Immutable definition of a single reward entry in a crate's reward pool.
    RewardSelectionGUI
    GUI shown when a player must pick from multiple rolled rewards.
    RewardSelectionGUIHolder
    Holder used to identify reward selection inventories in events and carry the rolled rewards for click handling.
    RewardType
    Defines the types of rewards that can be granted when a crate is opened.
    RotationGUI
    Slot-machine opening style.
    RotationGUIHolder
    Inventory holder for the rotation opening style.
    ScoreboardConfig
    Immutable configuration for the Sylphian Scoreboard sidebar appearance.
    ScoreboardConfigLoader
    Loads and parses sidebar appearance configuration from config.yml.
    ScoreboardService
    Core service for Sylphian-Scoreboard.
    SessionDao
    JDBI DAO for the mc_sessions table.
    SessionDao.SessionRow
    Internal data transfer object for JDBI mapping.
    SessionModel
    Database model representing a record in the mc_sessions table.
    SessionRepository
    Repository implementation for session data using JDBI.
    SidebarContributor
    Interface for plugins that wish to contribute content to the player sidebar.
    SidebarLine
    Represents a single line of content in the player sidebar.
    SidebarService
    Sub-service responsible for sidebar content.
    Skill
    Contract for a single skill implementation.
    SkillDao
    JDBI DAO for the player_skills table.
    SkillDao.SkillRow
    Internal data transfer object for JDBI mapping.
    SkillDetailHolder
    Inventory holder for the per-skill ability detail GUI.
    SkillDetailMenu
    The per-skill ability detail GUI.
    SkillLevelUpEvent
    Fired on the main thread when a player's level in a skill increases.
    SkillMaxLevelEvent
    Fired on the main thread the first time a player reaches the level cap in a skill.
    SkillRegistry
    Holds all registered Skill instances.
    SkillRepository
    JDBI-backed implementation of ISkillRepository.
    SkillsAdminCommand
    Builds and registers the operator-only /sylphian-skills CommandAPI command tree.
    SkillsAdminContext
    Shared constants and helpers for /sylphian-skills admin subcommands.
    SkillsAPI
    Public cross-plugin contract for Sylphian-Skills, obtained via SkillsProvider.
    SkillsBridge
    Isolates all Sylphian-Skills class references so they are only linked when Sylphian-Skills is confirmed to be present.
    SkillsConfig
    Immutable snapshot of Sylphian-Skills configuration.
    SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig
    Configuration for a single expansion tier.
    SkillsConfig.LevelUpConfig
    Immutable snapshot of level-up visual effects.
    SkillsListener
    Seeds and clears the skill XP cache as players join and leave.
    SkillsMenu
    The skill category browser GUI.
    SkillsMenuHolder
    Inventory holder for the skills category list GUI.
    SkillsMenuListener
    Handles click and drag events inside the skills GUI inventories.
    SkillsPlaceholderExpansion
    Exposes skill data as PlaceholderAPI placeholders.
    SkillsPlayerCommand
    Builds and registers the player-facing /skills CommandAPI command.
    SkillsProvider
    Static access point to the skills API.
    SkillsService
    Core service implementing SkillsAPI.
    SkillXPGainEvent
    Fired on the main thread after a player gains XP in a skill.
    StatusLevel
    Represents the display state of an ActiveAbility in the selection GUI.
    SteadyCurrent
    Passive perk unlocked at level 20.
    SubCommand
    A single subcommand contributing one literal branch to a command tree.
    SubCommand
    A single subcommand contributing one literal branch to a command tree.
    SuperFishEnchantmentListener
    Listener for consumption of items with the Super Fish enchantment.
    SuperFishMutation
    A mutation that applies the Super Fish enchantment to a caught fish.
    SylphianClans
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Clans.
    SylphianCooking
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Cooking.
    SylphianCookingCommand
    Root administrative command for Sylphian-Cooking.
    SylphianCrates
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Crates.
    SylphianCratesCommand
    Root administrative command for Sylphian-Crates.
    SylphianDatabase
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Database.
    SylphianEconomy
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Economy.
    SylphianFishing
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Fishing.
    SylphianFishingBootstrap
    Bootstrapper for the Sylphian-Fishing plugin.
    SylphianFishingCommand
    Root administrative command for Sylphian Fishing.
    SylphianItems
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Items.
    SylphianItemsCommand
    Root administrative command for Sylphian Items.
    SylphianProfile
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Profile.
    SylphianScoreboard
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Scoreboard.
    SylphianSkills
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Skills.
    TerritoryCache
    In-memory cache of chunk ownership, keyed on world:chunkX:chunkZ.
    TerritoryProtectionListener
    Enforces territory protection in claimed chunks.
    TerritoryService
    Business logic for claiming and unclaiming chunks on behalf of clans.
    TerritoryTitleListener
    Shows a fading title when a player enters a clan's territory, and a "Wilderness" title when they step out into unclaimed land.
    TerritoryTrackingListener
    Watches player movement and fires ClanTerritoryExitEvent and ClanTerritoryEnterEvent when a player crosses a chunk boundary into a differently-owned chunk.
    TraceEntry
    A single recorded contribution from a passive ability to a PassiveTrigger token.
    TransferSubCommand
    /clan transfer <player> — leader-only; hands leadership to another member.
    UnclaimSubCommand
    /sylphian-clans unclaim <world> <chunk_x> <chunk_z> — force-unclaims a specific chunk.
    UnclaimSubCommand
    /clan unclaim [all] — releases the current chunk, or all territory (leader only).
    UserProfile
    Represents a cached player profile in memory.
    UserProfile.Entitlement
    Represents a specific entitlement owned by a player.
    VerificationReason
    Enumeration of reasons why a player verification might fail or be restricted.
    VerificationReason
    Reasons for verification failure or access denial on the Velocity proxy.
    VerificationResponse
    Represents the detailed verification data returned by the API for a specific player.
    VerificationResponse
    Data model for the verification payload returned by the API.
    VerificationResult
    Represents the final result of a verification check within the plugin.
    VerificationResult
    Represents the final decision of a verification check on Velocity.
    VerifyClient
    HTTP client for communicating with the Sylphian verification API.
    VerifyClient
    HTTP client for communicating with the Sylphian verification API from the Velocity proxy.
    VerifyManager
    Manages the verification lifecycle for players, including rate limiting and cooldowns.
    VerifyManager
    Manages the verification logic on the Velocity proxy.
    VerifyPaper
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Verify-Paper.
    VerifyPluginMessageListener
    Listens for plugin messages from the Velocity proxy.
    VerifyService
    High-level service for handling player verification.
    VerifyService
    High-level service for handling player verification on Velocity.
    VerifyVelocity
    Main plugin class for Sylphian-Verify-Velocity.
    VisualManager
    Manages the visual representation of player profiles in-game.
    WarpSubCommand
    /clan warp (GUI) and its management subcommands: set, remove, access, and restrict.
    Watchable
    Optional capability for skills that support live debug tracing.
    WatchSubCommand
    /sylphian-skills watch <skill> <player>
    WeatherCondition
    Represents the weather condition at the time of a fishing catch.
    XpSubCommand
    /sylphian-skills xp <add|set|remove> <player> <skill> <amount>
